claim: The Africa Fertilizer and Soil Health Summit documented average fertilizer use of 15 kg/ha in SSA versus 150 kg/ha globally, with soil nutrient depletion costing an estimated 3 percent of agricultural GDP annually.

source.title: Africa Fertilizer and Soil Health Summit Declaration

method: Reviewed summit declaration, soil-health data, and fertilizer-access analysis.
limitations: Fertilizer-access data varies by country and crop.
Soil-nutrient data is sparse outside research sites.
